vibe: Cinematic, moody, high-end, decision-focused. Netflix meets Casting Platform.

typography.tracking: tracking-tight for headings, normal for body

admin.surface_style: Neumorphism & Grid Borders. Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows.

client.surface_style: Crystal Glassmorphism for floating elements (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10), pure massive imagery.

spacing.philosophy: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 to create breathing room, especially in the client view.
spacing.containers: Must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) if they have borders.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or very subtle rounding (rounded-md). High contrast (white bg, black text for primary). Hover: opacity-90 or scale-down slightly.
components.cards: Cardless or flat rectangular. Use 1px border (border-white/10). No drop shadows. Hover: subtle border brightness increase.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs heavily customized. bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white.
components.tables: Clean, border-collapse. border-b border-white/10 only. Generous padding.

motion.hover: Subtle brightness changes, transform scale(0.98) for clicks.

admin_login_background.description: Dark luxury abstract texture for admin login background

client_hero_background.description: Minimalist dark cinematic studio background for hero/empty states

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Outfit and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html.
Admin Dashboard: Use pure #050505 backgrounds. Employ 'Control Room Grid' for layout. Keep metrics sharp with 1px border-white/10.

Client Surface: The talent is the hero. Use full-screen or massive image grids. Apply 'Tetris Grid' for asymmetrical layout. Overlay navigation with Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl).
Interactions: All buttons and interactive cards MUST have clear :hover states (e.g. border brightening, slight scaling) and :focus states (high contrast ring).
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use Inter font or any generic purple/teal gradients. Stick to the monochromatic Obsidian/Pearl palette.
